description: Managed 55 institutional partners and 138 Master Trainers, streamlining stakeholder communication and ensuring 100% alignment with project timelines.
Facilitated the onboarding and engagement of project beneficiaries, contributing to a reach of 91,239 individuals (28.5% of the total target beneficiaries)
Spearheaded administrative setup and served as a program host for virtual events, enhancing partner relations and ensuring professional delivery of campaign initiatives
Reviewed Figma designs and code implementation, providing actionable feedback to maintain alignment with project requirements and quality standards.
Maintained 88% adherence to project deadlines and timelines, streamlining workflow processes and tracking progress through project management tools.

projects.title: Project Balik Bakawan
projects.description: A community-based mangrove restoration project in Brgy. Sabang, Del Gallego, aimed at restoring mangrove ecosystems and empowering local communities through sustainable livelihood opportunities.

projects.title: Bicol Youth for Technology Expo (BYTE)
projects.description: Led an outreach caravan and coordinated logistics for a regional technology advocacy initiative serving over 1,000 participants. Managed volunteer teams and facilitated expert sessions on modern project management tools and workflows.
